ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecular_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular structure */,
  "molecular_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecular type */,
  "x_ray_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using X-ray crystallography */,
  "em_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using electron microscopy (EM) */,
  "nmr_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) */,
  "multiple_methods_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using multiple methods */,
  "neutron_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using neutron diffraction */,
  "other_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using other methods */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of structures */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the structure (in Angstroms) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication (e.g., DOI, PMID) */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed experimental conditions for the structure determination */,
  "structure_version" INTEGER /* Version of the structure */,
  "structure_status" TEXT /* Status of the structure (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  "resolution_quality" TEXT /* Qualitative measure of the resolution (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "structural_integrity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the integrity of the structure */,
  "biological_function" TEXT /* Brief description of the biological function of the molecule */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure was first created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_structures_molecular_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecular_type_id") REFERENCES molecular_types ("molecular_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_types" (
  "molecular_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular type */,
  "molecular_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecular type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the molecular type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the molecular type (e.g., protein, nucleic acid, complex) */,
  "is_complex" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the molecular type is a complex */,
  "common_use_cases" TEXT /* Common use cases for the molecular type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecular_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., X-ray, EM, NMR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Category of the method (e.g., crystallography, microscopy) */,
  "is_advanced" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the method is considered advanced */,
  "resolution_range" TEXT /* Typical resolution range for the method (e.g., 1.0-3.0 Å) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_methods" (
  "structure_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure-method mapping */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used */,
  "method_count" INTEGER /* Number of structures determined using this method */,
  "method_version" INTEGER /* Version of the method used */,
  "method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the method used for the structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structure_methods_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES molecular_structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structure_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication (e.g., DOI, PMID) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structure_publications" (
  "structure_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure-publication mapping */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated publication */,
  "publication_version" INTEGER /* Version of the publication */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structure_publications_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES molecular_structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structure_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the structure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES molecular_structures ("structure_id")
)
